source: Unified local inventory for the CAOS LDA HSI validation backend

family_views.family_title: Individual spectra with labels or measurements
Regions with measurements or external variables

datasets.name: Indian Pines corrected
datasets.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
datasets.supervision_caveat: Labels support class/topic validation, not mineral or response-variable claims.
datasets.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

datasets.name: Salinas-A corrected
datasets.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
datasets.supervision_caveat: Tiny footprint makes it ideal for validation experiments, but labels remain crop classes only.
datasets.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

datasets.name: Pavia University
datasets.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
datasets.supervision_caveat: Urban classes support spatial/material comparison, but they are not laboratory material measurements.
datasets.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

datasets.name: Kennedy Space Center
datasets.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
datasets.supervision_caveat: Wetland classes enable label alignment; ecological or biophysical responses are not included.
datasets.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

datasets.name: Botswana
datasets.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
datasets.supervision_caveat: Labels support validation, but the raw file is close enough to the size policy to prefer derived assets.
datasets.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local by default; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

datasets.name: Salinas corrected
datasets.label_scope: official pixel class labels available in the local derived payload
datasets.supervision_caveat: Class labels are valid for topic-label association and supervised class tests only.
datasets.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU benchmark attribution; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Raw files stay local unless separately approved; compact derived JSON and previews are publishable.

datasets.name: Cuprite reflectance
datasets.label_scope: no official ground-truth map is bundled in the current app payload
datasets.supervision_caveat: Topic strata and spectral-library neighbors are exploratory until calibrated wavelength and external mineral validation are added.
datasets.license_note: Use with UPV/EHU and AVIRIS provenance; raw redistribution remains policy-controlled because the file is near the active size limit.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Commit only compact previews, topic summaries, and method metadata.

datasets.name: Small hyperspectral unmixing ROI suite
datasets.label_scope: treated as unlabeled in the current app; support files may enable later reference comparisons
datasets.supervision_caveat: Use for topic-versus-unmixing comparisons, not for ground-truth class claims.
datasets.license_note: Source files come from the public MUA_SparseUnmixing repository; keep provenance and verify redistribution before raw tracking.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Raw MATLAB files stay local; compact derived summaries are publishable.

datasets.name: MicaSense RedEdge sample data
datasets.label_scope: no ground-truth class labels; strata are derived heuristics
datasets.supervision_caveat: NDVI and strata support exploratory comparison only; they are not field measurements.
datasets.license_note: Use with MicaSense sample-data provenance; keep raw orthomosaics outside Git by default.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Commit derived JSON and previews only; fetch raw orthomosaics on demand.

datasets.name: EuroSAT
datasets.label_scope: patch-level land-cover labels after a curated subset is selected
datasets.supervision_caveat: Patch labels are not pixel labels; UI comparisons must not imply pixel-level ground truth.
datasets.license_note: Verify subset packaging, citation, and redistribution terms before local ingestion.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Use a tiny curated Sentinel-2 patch subset or a reproducible downloader.

datasets.name: BigEarthNet v2.0
datasets.label_scope: patch-level multi-label land-cover annotations; pixel references require subset verification
datasets.supervision_caveat: Full archive is too large for the app; only a documented compact subset can be product-visible.
datasets.license_note: Verify BigEarthNet v2.0 license and selected patch metadata before local ingestion.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Keep archive external; publish only selected patch metadata and compact derived summaries.

datasets.name: WHU-Hi UAV hyperspectral scenes
datasets.label_scope: reported crop/land-cover labels require official source and license verification
datasets.supervision_caveat: No app claim until source files, labels, and redistribution rights are verified.
datasets.license_note: Current manifest points to the paper; official download and redistribution rules still need verification.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Do not ingest or expose in the app until a source manifest is complete.

datasets.name: HyRANK cross-scene hyperspectral benchmark
datasets.label_scope: class labels are candidate metadata until canonical source and files are verified
datasets.supervision_caveat: Do not use for cross-scene validation claims until source, labels, and splits are reproduced locally.
datasets.license_note: Verify canonical HyRANK source, license, and per-file sizes before ingestion.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Catalog-only until a reproducible acquisition manifest exists.

datasets.name: HySpecNet-11k
datasets.label_scope: no product-visible class labels selected
datasets.supervision_caveat: Useful for unsupervised transfer only after selected patch IDs and license constraints are documented.
datasets.license_note: Official EnMAP patch collection requires license/agreement review before redistribution.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Keep collection external; track only selected patch IDs and compact summaries.

datasets.name: Houston 2013 HSI + LiDAR
datasets.label_scope: class labels and LiDAR pairing are access-gated candidate metadata
datasets.supervision_caveat: No app-visible claim until access terms and redistribution constraints are cleared.
datasets.license_note: Use only after IEEE GRSS/UH terms and redistribution limits are verified.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Catalog-only unless explicit access and publication permission are obtained.

datasets.name: Cross-scene wetland HSI
datasets.label_scope: wetland labels require subset extraction and source verification before app use
datasets.supervision_caveat: Treat as external research data until compact patches and label semantics are documented.
datasets.license_note: Archive is too large for Git; verify selected patch license and attribution before derived publication.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Full archive stays external; only small derived patches may become app assets.

datasets.name: Landsat Collection 2 Level-2
datasets.label_scope: query results have no inherent class labels in the current product
datasets.measurement_scope: surface reflectance and temperature products can support derived index workflows
datasets.supervision_caveat: Requires geospatial ingestion before it can become a reproducible app dataset.
datasets.license_note: Use official USGS Landsat access paths and scene metadata; do not track full products in Git.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Publish only small selected tiles and derived index summaries after ingestion exists.

datasets.name: CAVE Multispectral Image Database
datasets.label_scope: scene or object labels are candidate metadata; no pixel labels are configured
datasets.supervision_caveat: Treat as a laboratory reference source until acquisition and label semantics are reproduced locally.
datasets.license_note: Verify official access, file layout, citation, and redistribution before ingestion.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: No raw tracking until a stable source manifest exists.

datasets.name: USGS Spectral Library Version 7
datasets.family_title: Individual spectra with labels or measurements
datasets.label_scope: material and group labels are available for curated compact samples
datasets.supervision_caveat: Nearest-reference matches are evidence, not material identifications.
datasets.license_note: Use USGS data-release provenance and cite the source; never commit the full multi-GB library.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Track only compact curated samples and source-file metadata.

datasets.name: ECOSTRESS Spectral Library v1.0
datasets.family_title: Individual spectra with labels or measurements
datasets.label_scope: material labels are expected but not yet represented in local derived assets
datasets.supervision_caveat: Local metadata now reproduces visible category counts, but no app-visible sample should exist until a session-backed export path and subset redistribution policy are verified.
datasets.access: public JPL category metadata plus login-gated bulk checkout
datasets.license_note: Public category metadata is reproducible, but bulk export currently routes through a login form; verify export terms, citation, and subset redistribution before ingestion.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Keep full library external; publish only compact representative slices.

datasets.name: HIDSAG geometallurgy database
datasets.family_title: Regions with measurements or external variables
datasets.label_scope: sample ids and response targets are locally visible across GEOMET, MINERAL1, MINERAL2, and GEOCHEM metadata, with supervised subset benchmarks already running
datasets.measurement_scope: geometallurgical, mineralogical, and geochemical responses are locally verified across four subsets; repeated-measurement support now exists for GEOCHEM
datasets.supervision_caveat: This is now a real local multi-subset source, but no product claim is acceptable until wavelength handling, broader splits, richer documents, metrics, and model cards exist.
datasets.access: public Figshare collection API and direct download URLs
datasets.license_note: The article is CC BY 4.0 and the current Figshare subset metadata reports CC0; keep full ZIPs local and publish only compact derived metadata or explicitly approved exports.
datasets.raw_asset_policy: Keep ZIPs local; version only manifests, compact derived metadata, and patch-region summaries. GEOMET, MINERAL1, MINERAL2, and GEOCHEM are the current downloaded subsets.
